title: A Social Celebrity
writer: Robert Benchley, Pierre Collings, Monte M. Katterjohn
actors: Adolphe Menjou, Louise Brooks, Eleanor Lawson
plot: Small-town barber Max Haber (Adolphe Menjou), is the pride of his father, Johann, who owns an antiquated barbershop. Max adores Kitty Laverne (Louise Brooks), the manicurist, who loves him but is ambitious to be a dancer, so she h...
